result:
All four files created and verified. Here's the summary:

```yaml
status: done
summary: >
  Created a self-contained calculator app in tools/calculator/ with index.html (UI),
  style.css (dark modern theme), app.js (safe expression evaluation with no eval(), left-to-right chaining),
  and README.md (usage instructions). Includes keyboard support, divide-by-zero error handling,
  and floating-point noise suppression.
files_changed:
  - tools/calculator/index.html
  - tools/calculator/style.css
  - tools/calculator/app.js
  - tools/calculator/README.md
acceptance:
  - criterion: "Three files exist under tools/calculator/ (html, css, js) plus README"
    met: true
  - criterion: "Basic ops work: +, 鈭? 脳, 梅, decimal, clear"
    met: true
  - criterion: "Divide by zero shows error message, does not crash"
    met: true
  - criterion: "No eval() on unsanitized input"
    met: true
  - criterion: "Only files under tools/calculator/ are created or modified"
    met: true
blockers: []
notes: "Left-to-right evaluation (no operator precedence). Keyboard input supported: 0-9, +, -, *, /, ., Enter/=, Backspace, Escape/C."
```
